# Copilot Instructions

- This repository is documentation-only.
- Do not add application code unless explicitly requested.
- Use concise, professional English.
- Prefer Markdown for new content.
- Diagrams must use Mermaid by default; use PlantUML only when Mermaid is insufficient; use ASCII only as a last fallback.
- Keep GradeOps AI positioned as an AI-native assessment operations business.
- Avoid generic AI assistant language.
- Prioritize business viability, customer evidence, agent operations, and hackathon deliverables.
